title: Stop Prompting Claude. Start Loop Engineering.
summary: Loop Engineering, also called Agentic Engineering, is a structured approach to building AI systems using iterative loops instead of single prompts. The framework includes five building blocks: Trigger, Execution Skills, Goal and Verification, Output and Memory, and feedback cycles.
